---
title: "Genotyping QC pre-Imputation"
author: "Darren Cameron"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
params:
  in_dir: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(stringr)
library(DT)
in_dir <- '../results/04GENOTYPES/GenotypeQCtoHRC/eqtlgenotypeshg38pretm/'
```

## QC tables {.tabset}

***



### QC 5: Ancestry Inference

***

```{r ancestry_summary, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
ancestry_tbl <- system(
  paste0("cat ", in_dir, "eqtl_genotypes_hg19.qc5.ancestry_inference.txt | cut -f 1-9"),
  intern = TRUE
) %>%
  read_tsv(col_types = cols()) 

datatable(ancestry_tbl, caption = 'Ancestry prediction per sample, with probabilities') 
```

***
